title: Hitarget Vertical Geo Floral African Wax Wrapper
overview: Authentic Hitarget wax block print with bold vertical geometric crosses and delicate floral vines on a black pinstripe base.
description: This premium Hitarget African wrapper fabric pairs a deep black ground with white dotted pinstripes and vibrant red, orange, yellow, and peach vertical panels. Geometric cross motifs alternate with flowing vine florals for a sophisticated ceremonial look. Ideal for traditional wrappers, headties, and bespoke African formalwear.
features: Authentic Hitarget guaranteed wax block print
Bold vertical geometric and floral design
Ideal for wrappers and traditional attire

title: Black Prince Golden Java Violeta Wax Print — 6 Yards
overview: Prestigious Black Prince Golden Java 100% cotton wax print from the exclusive Violeta Collection with burgundy geometric florals.
description: Part of the Violeta Collection by Black Prince, this 6-yard Golden Java wax print features deep burgundy and black concentric lines overlaid with bold red florals and golden diamond accents. A veritable block print quality fabric perfect for elegant wrappers, dresses, and high-fashion African garments.

title: Chiganvy Blue Wave Gold Grid Waxhaus Wrapper
overview: Dynamic Chiganvy wax print by Waxhaus featuring bold blue waves over gold speckle and dark grid panels.
description: Printed by Waxhaus, this Chiganvy wrapper showcases thick wavy blue lines with dark outlines flowing across alternating gold-brown speckled and fine grid sections. The energetic design makes a striking choice for modern African wrappers, dresses, and statement fashion pieces.

title: Chiganvy Purple Brown Fan Floral Lock Print Wax
overview: Super Chiganvy lock print wax fabric with intricate fan-shaped florals and patterned leaves on a crackle purple ground.
description: This Waxhaus Chiganvy fabric displays dense fan-shaped flowers and detailed almond leaves in deep purple, brown, and tan against a marbled crackle background. A refined choice for traditional wrappers, elegant dresses, and custom African couture.
features: Intricate fan floral and leaf motif

title: Waxhaus Earth Tone Ornate Shield African Wax Print
overview: Sophisticated brown and navy Waxhaus print with horizontal bands, teardrop motifs, and ornate shield patterns.
description: Crafted with a fine wood-grain textured brown background, this Waxhaus fabric features decorative horizontal bands, teardrop shapes with dot details, and large ornate shield motifs in navy and white. Perfect for distinguished wrappers and premium African attire.
features: Ideal for wrappers and formal wear

title: Phoenix Hitarget Red Yellow Maze Wax — 12 Yards
overview: Guaranteed Phoenix Hitarget 12-yard cotton wax with intricate red maze pattern and yellow dotted accents.
description: This generous 12-yard Phoenix Hitarget wrapper features a dense red and black maze design accented by bright yellow vertical dots. Traditional geometric border bands complete the look, making it ideal for full traditional outfits, wrappers, and ceremonial African fashion.

title: Lime Green Black Floral Guaranteed Wax Wrapper
overview: Vibrant lime green African wax print adorned with intricate black floral, star, and vine motifs.
description: A bold lime green guaranteed wax block print covered in densely arranged black five-petaled flowers, star blossoms, and curved vine details. This eye-catching fabric is perfect for wrappers, gele headties, dresses, and everyday African fashion.

title: Amstex Lime Bubble Dot African Wax Print — 6 Yards
overview: Amstex by Verbelle Group wax print with lime green bubble shapes on a red and navy dotted ground.
description: Original Amstex fabric featuring flowing diagonal paths of lime green oval bubble motifs outlined in black and white, set against dense red and navy dot backgrounds. Six yards of premium 100% cotton ideal for stunning wrappers and custom African garments.
features: Unique bubble and dot geometric pattern

title: Amarya Holytex Yellow Green Floral Wax — 6 Yards
overview: Amarya Collection veritable block print with bold yellow fan florals and green leaves on a pink brick ground.
description: From the Holytex Amarya W-Series, this 6-yard 100% cotton wax print showcases large yellow fan-shaped florals and vibrant green ribbed leaves against a pink hatched brick background. A celebratory fabric for wrappers, traditional dresses, and contemporary African style.

title: Chiganvy Navy Gold Mandala Circle Wax Print
overview: Chiganvy Waxhaus mandala print with concentric navy and gold circles on a leaf-patterned geometric ground.
description: This 100% cotton Chiganvy fabric by Waxhaus features large concentric mandala circles in navy, gold, and tan over a dense leaf-diamond textured background. Six yards of premium veritable block print perfect for elegant wrappers and bespoke African fashion.

title: Chiganvy Red Navy Jagged Leaf Stripe Wax Print
overview: Elegant Chiganvy wax print with horizontal jagged leaf stripes in red and navy on a marbled grey ground.
description: Super Chiganvy veritable block print featuring repeating horizontal feather-like leaf shapes in deep red and navy against a classic grey and white marbled crackle background. A refined fabric for wrappers, dresses, and sophisticated African attire.

title: Orange Navy Medallion Geometric African Wax Print
overview: Bold orange and navy wax print with concentric medallion circles and colorful triangle rows.
description: This striking African wax print features large orange and navy concentric medallions with triangular inner details, set against rows of orange and teal triangles on a deep navy ground. White crackle blocks add traditional wax texture for wrappers and modern African fashion.

title: Premium Handwoven Kente-Style Orange Black Wrapper Stack
overview: Neatly stacked premium handwoven wrappers in vibrant orange, black, and white Kente-inspired geometric patterns.
description: This collection of handwoven African wrappers showcases alternating orange checkered bands and black-and-white geometric stripes reminiscent of traditional Kente cloth. Premium woven quality ideal for weddings, cultural celebrations, and formal ceremonies.

overview: Hitarget guaranteed wax block print with neon pink, orange, and cyan dotted chevron waves on black.
description: A modern Hitarget wax print featuring energetic wavy chevron bands of neon pink, bright orange, and cyan blue dots against a sharp black background. Pattern number 3399702 — perfect for bold wrappers, contemporary dresses, and statement African fashion.

title: Chiganvy Pink Lime Bold Floral Waxhaus Print
overview: Chiganvy Waxhaus print with large pink spiral florals and lime green petals on a dotted black ground.

overview: Hitarget premium wax print with ribbed fan-shaped leaves in magenta, lime green, and sky blue on black.

overview: Chiganvy Waxhaus fabric with interlocking orange-red and cyan semicircle arcs on a dotted grid ground.

Each piece offers a smooth sheen and soft drape perfect for evening wear, linings, and luxury African attire.

description: A contemporary ready-to-wear halter maxi on a warm golden tan ground featuring large circles, segmented arcs, and rhythmic linear geometric elements in black, white, bright red, and striking turquoise blue. Lustrous fabric with fluid elegant drape.

title: Pink Gold Crackle Batik Halter Maxi Dress
overview: Vibrant halter maxi with black crackle batik web overlaid with magenta, yellow, and cerulean organic leaf shapes.
description: This striking ready-to-wear halter maxi features an intricate black crackle spider-web batik pattern on pale pink with bold abstract organic leaf shapes in magenta, sunny yellow, and cerulean blue. Gold rhinestone belt and fluid polished-cotton drape for festive occasions.

title: Multicolor Stylized Leaf Silk Halter Maxi Dress
overview: Artistic halter maxi with overlapping stylized leaves in pink, yellow, ochre, brown, purple, and white with black outlines.
description: An elegant ready-to-wear halter maxi showcasing overlapping graphic leaf and petal shapes in soft rose, deep magenta, golden yellow, ochre, chocolate brown, muted purple, and white outlined in black. Silky lustrous finish with beautiful floor-length pooling drape.

title: Rainbow Brushstroke Ombre Halter Maxi Dress
overview: Vivid halter maxi with horizontal wavy brushstroke bands in magenta, cyan, yellow, red, orange, and blue.
description: This radiant ready-to-wear halter maxi features dynamic horizontal wavy paint bands in magenta, cyan, lemon yellow, fiery red, orange, and deep blue on a lustrous lightweight fabric. Floor-length pooling hem for a bold rainbow-inspired fashion statement.

title: Prism Geo Stripe Silk Halter Maxi Dress
overview: Contemporary halter maxi with irregular vertical geo stripes in magenta, teal, yellow, blue, beige, and purple.
description: A fashion-forward ready-to-wear halter maxi featuring bold irregular vertical stripes and angular geometric shapes in deep magenta, emerald teal, bright yellow-orange, royal blue, beige tan, and dark purple. Satin-like lustrous finish with fluid elegant drape.

title: Tri-Color Batik Circle Halter Maxi Dress
overview: Graphic halter maxi with red, cyan, and black color blocks featuring crackled batik circles and jagged flame edges.
description: This bold ready-to-wear halter maxi divides into three horizontal sections — vibrant red, bright cyan blue, and deep black — each adorned with large off-white crackled batik circles connected by jagged flame-like transitions. Gold belt accent on smooth flowing fabric.

title: Burgundy Gold Baroque Halter Maxi Dress
overview: Opulent halter maxi with vertical burgundy baroque scrollwork, gold filigree, and subtle leopard texture accents.
description: A regal ready-to-wear halter maxi in deep burgundy maroon featuring repeating vertical ornate baroque scrollwork and filigree in shimmering gold and white with subtle leopard print texture details. Lightweight fluid chiffon-like fabric with gold rhinestone belt.

title: Golden Beach Sunset Palm Halter Maxi Dress
overview: Tropical halter maxi with golden sunset sky, black palm silhouettes, navy ocean waves, and rhinestone belt.
description: This vacation-ready halter maxi captures a scenic tropical beach at sunset with golden yellow and orange skies, bold black palm tree silhouettes, and navy blue ocean wave bands. Lightweight flowing fabric with a shimmering rhinestone belt for resort elegance.

title: Teal Mountain Landscape Silk Halter Maxi Dress
overview: Artistic halter maxi with painterly teal mountain landscape, stylized trees, and golden autumn accents.
description: An exquisite ready-to-wear halter maxi featuring a scenic ink-painting inspired landscape with teal and turquoise mountain silhouettes, stylized trees with reddish-orange and forest green foliage, and golden-yellow sunlight patches against misty pale blue skies. Silk-like lustrous drape.

title: White Canvas Graffiti Art Halter Maxi Dress
overview: Artistic halter maxi with graffiti-style brushstrokes in red, orange, yellow, lime, turquoise, and black on white.
description: This gallery-inspired ready-to-wear halter maxi treats crisp white as a canvas for sweeping graffiti-style strokes in bright red, orange, sunny yellow, lime green, turquoise blue, and deep black. Lightweight silky fabric with gold belt for a modern art-fashion fusion.

title: Turquoise Orange Starburst Halter Maxi Dress
overview: Energetic halter maxi with turquoise and orange abstract starburst florals and golden accents on white.
description: A dynamic ready-to-wear halter maxi on a clean white ground featuring large asymmetrical turquoise blue and vivid orange starburst flower explosions with golden-yellow highlights. Lightweight flowing fabric cinched with a thin shimmering gold belt.

title: Magenta Teal Retro Swirl Halter Maxi Dress
overview: Retro halter maxi with psychedelic swirling florals in magenta, teal, olive, and cream with silky fluid drape.
description: This vintage-inspired ready-to-wear halter maxi features large-scale organic swirling flower and petal shapes in bright magenta, deep teal, olive green, and off-white cream with a retro psychedelic aesthetic. Silky lustrous fabric with beautiful fluid floor-length drape.

title: Rainbow Lion Head Print Halter Maxi Dress
overview: Statement halter maxi with large rainbow lion head graphic in orange, red, green, blue, and purple on white.
description: Command attention in this ready-to-wear halter maxi featuring a large artistic digital print of a lion's head in a kaleidoscope of orange, red, green, blue, and purple on a clean white background. Silky elegant drape with gold rhinestone belt for gallery-worthy style.
